reasoning: Multiple highly authoritative sources (Variety, IGN, BBC, ESPN, The Guardian) published between May and November 2025 confirm that Rockstar Games has officially delayed the release of Grand Theft Auto VI. Originally targeted for Fall 2025, it was first delayed to May 2026, and as of November 6, 2025 (just three days before the knowledge cutoff), Take-Two Interactive announced during their quarterly earnings that the game is now officially delayed again until November 19, 2026. Therefore, the game will absolutely not be available for sale in Europe in 2025 through standard authorized distribution channels. The probability is near zero.
